loadError.title: Google Maps Load Error
loadError.desc: Failed to load Google Maps. System has automatically switched to Simple Map for you to continue the experience.

authError.title: Google Maps Auth Error
authError.desc: Invalid or restricted API Key. System is switching to backup Map.

huntActive.title: 🎯 Treasure Hunt Mode
huntActive.desc: You have activated Treasure Hunt mode at this location. Move closer to start!

checkinReady.title: 📍 Ready for Check-in
checkinReady.desc: Location marked. You can check-in when you reach the correct coordinates!

loginRequired.title: Login Required
loginRequired.huntDesc: Please login to join Treasure Hunt!

checkinFailed.title: Check-in failed
checkinFailed.alreadyChecked: You have already checked in at this location today.

huntStart.title: Preparing for hunt
huntStart.desc: Starting to search for {{name}}. Radar effect activated!
